items.title: Python docs — `argparse` tutorial
items.note: Friendly tour of the stdlib argument parser; covers sub-parsers, types, defaults, exit codes.

items.title: Typer documentation
items.note: Type-hint-driven CLI library built on `click`; minimal boilerplate, sub-commands, auto-completion.

items.title: Click documentation
items.note: Decorator-based CLI library; richer command hierarchies and prompts than argparse.

items.title: Python Packaging User Guide — Entry points
items.note: How `[project.scripts]` and other entry points are declared and consumed.

items.title: 12 Factor CLI Apps
items.note: Distilled best practices for CLI design — most apply regardless of language.
